---
title: "Node Health Checking Evaluation Report"
author: "To Huynh Phuc"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```

## Import libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r}
file_path <- "results.csv"
```

```{r}
results <- read_csv(
  file_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE, col_types = cols( timestamp = col_character(), phase = col_character(), status = col_character(), elapsed_ms = col_double(), max_neighbors = col_integer(), initial_nodes = col_integer(), added_node_count = col_integer(), removed_node_count = col_integer(), expected_up = col_integer(), actual_up = col_integer(), problem_count = col_integer(), details = col_character(), topology = col_character() ) ) %>% mutate( record_id = row_number(), timestamp = ymd_hms(timestamp), elapsed_seconds = elapsed_ms / 1000, # Convert each topology JSON string into a named R list
                              topology = map( topology, ~ fromJSON(.x, simplifyVector = FALSE) ) )
```

```{r}
topology_long <- results %>% select( record_id, timestamp, phase, status, max_neighbors, topology ) %>% mutate( nodes = map( topology, ~ tibble( node_id = names(.x), api_status = map_chr(.x, "api"), process_status = map_chr(.x, "process"), neighbors = map(.x, "neighbors") ) ) ) %>% select(-topology) %>% unnest(nodes) %>% mutate( neighbor_count = lengths(neighbors) )
```

```{r}
glimpse(results)
glimpse(topology_long)
```
